name: Word Match 3D
description: Play Word Match 3D online for free! This is an addictive word puzzle game that tests your vocabulary and observation skills. In this 3D brain teaser, your goal is to find specific 3D letters hidden in a messy pile to complete the target word. You must be fast to clear the level before the time runs out! Features: Word Matching: Search and collect letters to spell words. Shuffle Booster: Stuck? Use the Shuffle button to mix up the pile and reveal hidden letters. Brain Training: Improve your focus and spelling speed in a fun 3D world.
instructions: Use the mouse to interact - Left Click Select and collect 3D letters - Shuffle Button Click to rearrange the items if you get stuck
